title: Code for 'A Priori Error Analysis for the p-Stokes Equations with Slip Boundary Conditions: A Discrete Leray Projection Framework'
description: Legacy-FEniCS reproducibility package for the numerical experiments in Section 6 of the associated p-Stokes pressure-error article. The archive contains the fully discrete p-Stokes solver, strong and Lagrange-multiplier treatments of the impermeability condition, convergence-table scripts, projection-stability scripts, tests, and the published numerical data.
